attacking_style: Launches decisive solo moves from reduced breakaway groups on uncategorized rises with 12-15km remaining, using classics power to sustain long efforts to the line.
team_tactics: Operates with freedom in breakaways as stage-hunting specialist, relying on individual strength rather than team setup once in the move.
terrain_preference: Punchy uncategorized climbs that thin breakaways but don't favor pure climbers; flat-to-rolling finales where classics power sustains solo efforts over 10+ kilometers.
vulnerability: Likely exposed on categorized mountain stages where pure climbers dominate; requires breakaway freedom rather than team-dependent scenarios.
key_patterns: Attacks from reduced breakaways rather than peloton, timing moves on terrain transitions.
Sustains long solo efforts (12km documented), leveraging classics engine over pure sprint speed.
Targets stages where classics power bridges gap between sprinters and climbers.
form_trajectory: positive: Immediate Grand Tour stage success as first-year Bora signing demonstrates effective adaptation to three-week racing format
